title: Granblue Fantasy: 10th Anniversary Movie
titleNative: グランブルーファンタジー: 10th Anniversary Movie

title: Tonari no 801-chan
synopsis: The manga follows the personal life of a fujoshi (female boys-love Otaku) and her Otaku boyfriend. (Source: Anime News Network) Note: Announced in 2008 to be released in 2009, later it was cancelled, as reported by TBS.

title: Color Cycling
synopsis: A work with the theme of color following a soul and the circle of life as color and colorlessness wax and wane. (Source: MyAnimeList) Note: The short had an updated version uploaded to YouTube on February 21st, 2019 which has some minor color changes for some scenes

title: Cap Kakumei Bottleman DX: Side Story
titleRomaji: Cap Kakumei Bottleman DX: Side Story
titleNative: キャップ革命 ボトルマンDX　サイドストーリー
synopsis: Side stories to Cap Kakumei Bottleman DX released biweekly on the Takara Tomy YouTube channel.

title: Tenchi Muyou! Ryououki: Heianmuyo! Picture Drama
titleRomaji: Tenchi Muyou! Ryououki: Heianmuyo! Picture Drama
titleNative: 天地無用! 魎皇鬼 謹製びでお絵本 平安無用!
synopsis: A standalone Tenchi Muyou Ryououki picture drama released as a part of PAC on VHS and seemingly around the same time on laser disc. The premise of Tenchi Muyou! Ryououki: Heian Muyo! has Aeka, Yosho (in his Katsuhito form), Tenchi, Mihoshi, Ryou-Ouki, and Ryouko in the Heian era (794 AD to 1185) of Japan. Tenchi and Mihoshi are samurai partners on their way to slay a demon, while Aeka longs for Tenchi's return.

title: The IDOLM@STER Million Live!: The Backstage
titleRomaji: The IDOLM@STER Million Live!: The Backstage
titleNative: アイドルマスター ミリオンライブ！ ～The Backstage～
synopsis: A new episode included in volume 3 of the Blu-ray release depicting behind-the-scenes footage of the opening performance

tags.name: Idol
tags.description: Centers around the life and activities of an idol.

title: Wangu Kuang Di
synopsis: The story revolves around Chu Kuangsheng, the son of Patriarch Chu in the remote Shiyang town within the Shenlong Empire. Born weak and unable to train, Chu Kuangsheng becomes the laughingstock of the entire town. However, after inheriting the ancestral technique of the Chu family during an ambush, he rebuilds his damaged meridians and rapidly progresses in his training. Despite appearing weak on the surface, he has another identity—the renowned Kuangzun in the martial world. Chu Kuangsheng discovers a collusion within the Chu clan related to his parents’ disappearance, and he uses his hidden identity to secretly gather strength and information. With one face and two identities, he battles against heroes and becomes a master.

title: Megaton-kyuu Musashi Pilot
titleNative: メガトン級ムサシ パイロット版
synopsis: Pilot episode of Megaton-kyuu Musashi released on YouTube in 2016.

title: Dragon Ball Z: The Real 4-D at Super Tenkaichi Budokai
titleRomaji: Dragon Ball Z: The Real 4-D at Super Tenkaichi Budokai
titleNative: ドラゴンボールZ ザ・リアル4-D at 超天下一武道会

title: Dear Viruses
titleNative: 親愛なるウイルスたちへ
synopsis: This work is a missive to the life form we call viruses in the hope that we can coexist. The relationship between humans and viruses is poetically expressed from a different perspective. 1st year work 2021, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Space delivery
synopsis: Third year graduation work of Fukuho Tamanoi at Tama Art University, 2022.

tags.name: Aliens
tags.description: Prominently features extraterrestrial lifeforms.

tags.description: Centers around cooking or food appraisal.

tags.name: Space
tags.description: Partly or completely set in outer space.

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: Hua Jianghu: Tiangang
synopsis: During the anniversary period, the situation was turbulent, and treacherous ministers were in power. The bad guys, a secret assassination organization directly under the emperor, suddenly became leaderless overnight. The bad guy Yuan Tiangang left a letter and resigned. Yuan Tiangang, who had lost his direction in life, came to Anle Pavilion in Chang’an under the guidance of the tips bag left by his friend Li Chunfeng, but he never thought that this place would be the place of romance. And everything that happened next, as those seeking freedom, those seeking immortality, and those seeking power appeared one by one, opened a new prelude to Yuan Tiangang’s journey

title: Araburu Kisetsu no Otome-domo yo. Mini Anime
titleRomaji: Araburu Kisetsu no Otome-domo yo. Mini Anime
synopsis: Mini anime released on the official Twitter account of main series.

tags.name: Chibi

title: Captain Tsubasa (2018) Special
synopsis: Short special of Captain Tsubasa (2018) animated for the FNS27 2019 event.

title: Sentou Yousei Yukikaze: Experimental Movie
titleNative: 戦闘妖精雪風 EXPERIMENTAL MOVIE
synopsis: A short film included with the Yukikaze Blu-ray box set set after the final episode of the main OVA series.

title: The Egret River
synopsis: Among the tall buildings of the city, a lonely guard hides a beautiful field where he meets an egret. However, the expansion of the city never stops, and one day the field is destroyed. The egret escapes without a trace and the guard begins to see mysterious illusions. (Source: Official Site)

title: Wan Jie Xian Zong 6
synopsis: The sixth season of Wanjie Xianzong .

title: Wan Wan Train Doko e Iku?
titleRomaji: Wan Wan Train Doko e Iku?
titleNative: わんわんトレインどこへいく？
synonyms: 終末トレインどこへいく？ ミニアニメ
Shuumatsu Train Doko e Iku? Mini Anime
Train to the End of the World Mini Anime
synopsis: Mini anime of Shuumatsu Train Doko e Iku? posted on the KADOKAWA Anime YouTube channel. Shizuru, Nadeshiko, Remi, and Akira are affected by 7G!? They've transformed into a Wan Wan Train! I wonder if everyone can get along...?

tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of female characters.

tags.description: Main character is female.

title: Seizoki
synopsis: This is an animation using the "Kaki-mation" technique. This piece can be shown as a multiscreen piece with 3 screens. (Source: Collaborative Cataloging Japan)

title: Anapoko
synopsis: After graduating from Tama Art University, Nakajima made this work with the intention of submitting to the Sogetsu Animation Festival. Without much funding to work with, Nakajima devised the technique "Kaki-mation," a method of drawing directly on 35mm film. At this time, he frequented Studio Zero—the formative mainstream animation production company of the period. (Source: Collaborative Cataloging Japan)

title: Kakuriyo -Bed & Breakfast for Spirits- 2
titleNative: かくりよの宿飯 第２期
synopsis: The second season of Kakuriyo no Yadomeshi . Aoi—a girl who can see spirits known as ayakashi—was suddenly approached by an ogre. Demanding she pay her grandfather’s debt, Odanna made a huge request: her hand in marriage! Refusing this absurd offer, Aoi decided to work at the Tenjin-ya bed and breakfast to pay back what her family owes. Where we left off, Aoi continues her employment at the Tenjin-ya where even more ayakashi drama ensues and challenges await her. (Source: Crunchyroll, edited)

tags.description: Prominently or partially set in a snowy environment.

tags.name: Travel

tags.name: Wilderness
tags.description: Predominantly features a location with little to no human activity, such as a deserted island, a jungle, or a snowy mountain range.
